$comment: Aggregated RegScale API-import payloads for the five DoD Cloud Computing SRG profiles. Mirrors oscal_profile_to_regscale.py output. For each profile in `profiles`, POST it to /api/profiles, take the returned id, set profileID on each row in the matching `profileMappings[].mappings` block (and resolve controlIdentifier -> integer controlID against your tenant catalog), then POST to /api/profileMapping/batchCreate.
